description: iShares Ethereum Trust - iShares Ethereum Trust ETF is an exchange traded fund launched and managed by iShares Delaware Trust Sponsor LLC. The fund invests in the currency markets. It invests in ether. The fund seeks to track the performance of the CME CF EtherDollar Reference Rate  New York Variant. The index measures the price of ether denominated in U.S. dollars. iShares Ethereum Trust - iShares Ethereum Trust ETF was formed on June 24, 2024 and is domiciled in the United States.
